{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Blackflame Victory
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Blackflame Victory]] is indicated by golden characters.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c17">''Uncrowned'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle events]]
